wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikidata tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q28126001 vs Q5901028
Holly Lake Ranch - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q2505720 vs Q2505719
Texas State Highway Loop 564 - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q2505720 vs Q2505719
Texas State Highway Loop 173 - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific eror is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(4840783313)['wikidata'='Q28126001']['wikipedia'='en:Holly Lake Ranch, Texas']; relation(1459191)['wikidata'='Q2505720']['wikipedia'='en:List of state highway loops in Texas']; relation(412044)['wikidata'='Q2505720']['wikipedia'='en:List of state highway loops in Texas']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect']
